headline: A cryptographic change record is ready
summary: Compared the current folder against the previous local baseline and recorded every added, changed or removed file.

insights.title: Baseline refreshed
insights.body: The current snapshot is now the reference point for the next run.

insights.title: Content-aware monitoring
insights.body: Changed status is driven by size and SHA-256, not timestamp alone.

insights.title: Local chain of evidence
insights.body: The baseline remains in the product output folder.
